title: Tender Offers: In the context of merger negotiations, what is a "bear...
summary: Define a bear hug as an informal preliminary overture from a bidder to target company management.
prompt: In the context of merger negotiations, what is a "bear hug"?

options.text: A proxy contest for board control
A bear hug refers to an informal overture made by a bidder to the target

solution: A bear hug refers to an informal overture made by a bidder to the target company's management, often as a preliminary step before launching a formal takeover bid.
